reasoning:
Ju Wenjun's FIDE rank on Wikipedia as of late Feb 2026 is 4th, with a 24-point rating lead over the 5th-place players (Humpy and Tan). FIDE updates its ratings and rankings once a month, typically on the 1st. Consequently, Wikipedia's FIDE rankings page generally remains static throughout the month. Since the March list is effectively already published on Wikipedia as of Feb 28, her rank on March 1, 2026 will be established as 4th. 

For the March 8 resolution date, the Wikipedia list will not have changed, as it is in the middle of the month and FIDE only updates monthly. Thus, her ranking will identical to her March 1 rank. 

For the March 31 resolution date, it is highly likely that Wikipedia will still be displaying the March FIDE list. Even in the unlikely event that editors update the page a day early with the April 1 list, Ju Wenjun's substantial 24-point rating advantage over the 5th place players provides a massive buffer. Given her lack of recent poor performances to suggest a huge rating drop in March, she will almost certainly maintain a top-4 rank even on the April list. Therefore, confidence is very high for both dates, with slightly more uncertainty for the later date due to the small possibility of an early April update coupled with an unexpected tournament disaster.
